name: Enliven Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Enliven Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery and development of small molecule therapeutics. It is currently advancing ELVN-001 for the treatment of chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) and has no approved products or revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery and development of small molecule therapeutics.
